_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Raghunath Temple Jammu
temples.location: Raghunath Bazar, Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir
temples.description: One of the largest temple complexes of north India, with seven shrines and shikharas. The central shrine is dedicated to Lord Rama.

temples.name: Martand Sun Temple
temples.location: Mattan, Anantnag District, Jammu and Kashmir
temples.description: Historic Kashmiri Hindu temple ruins dedicated to Surya, described by the district administration as one of the most elegant structures ever built in India.

temples.name: Shankaracharya Temple
temples.location: Shankaracharya Hill, Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir
temples.description: An important Hindu temple on a hilltop in Srinagar, noted by the district administration among the city's places of interest.

temples.name: Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine
temples.location: Trikuta Hills, Katra, Jammu and Kashmir
temples.description: A major pilgrimage shrine near Katra, administered by Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine Board.

temples.name: Kheer Bhawani Temple
temples.location: Tulmulla, Ganderbal District, Jammu and Kashmir
temples.description: A revered temple set within a natural spring at Tulmulla, especially important to Kashmiri Pandit devotees.

temples.name: Bawey Wali Mata Temple
temples.location: Bahu Fort, Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir
temples.description: A Kali temple inside Bahu Fort, described by Jammu district administration as one of the region's important Shakti shrines.

temples.name: Shiv Khori Cave Shrine
temples.location: Ransoo, Reasi District, Jammu and Kashmir
temples.description: A holy cave shrine of Lord Shiva at Ransoo, listed by Reasi district administration among the district's religious destinations.
